extraction.one_line_summary: DÉMARE Arnaud attacked 300m from the line on wet cobbles after the final climb, held off IZAGIRRE's counterattack to win on the uphill finish
tactical_patterns: DÉMARE attacked at 300-400m on uphill cobbled finish, not from longer range, exploiting explosive power over sustained climbing
Breakaway survived 100+km until 14km remaining, suggesting peloton misjudged energy needed for technical uphill finale in rain
Crash at bottom of final climb (Cote de Mûr) eliminated approximately 10 riders, creating selection before gradient began
VUILLERMOZ solo attack in final kilometer failed on wet cobbles, proving surface neutralized sustained efforts favoring late explosive moves

rider_signals.DÉMARE Arnaud: positive: won uphill cobbled finish with 300m attack, showing climbing improvement beyond pure sprinter profile
rider_signals.IZAGIRRE Gorka: positive: resisted DÉMARE's attack and nearly caught him, indicating strong uphill sprint capability for GC rider
rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: neutral: mentioned as pre-race favorite for parcours but no result noted, suggesting underperformance on custom-suited terrain
rider_signals.VUILLERMOZ Alexis: negative: solo attack in final kilometer failed completely on wet cobbles, tactical error or lack of power
rider_signals.VAN GARDEREN Tejay: negative: abandoned after only 100km on opening stage, major early-season form concern
rider_signals.LAPORTE Christophe: positive: top six finish on uphill cobbled finish shows versatility beyond standard sprint profile
rider_signals.EL FARES Julien: positive: top six finish on selective uphill finale suggests stronger climbing than expected
rider_signals.ROELANDTS Jürgen: neutral: breakaway rider caught at 14km, standard long-range attempt without decisive positioning
